title: Never Stop Thinking About You

lyricsSegments.text: Left a wide to tell me which way you should go So I want you to know I never stop thinking about you I want you to know
Never once ever stop thinking 'bout you Is the job ahead I wanna be dead
I wanna be a number one fan, help you to the go to all the plants and all the dark lights in the bright news But your mama thinks you mean I'm holding it, I am a mama
The end moment thinks me is something I'm not against I can't say it's thoughts but I know that I'm there for you for the no win no lose Always for you
